parameters.jsCode:
// Reuse Brevo's existing attributes so country segments work and we don't create dup fields.
return [ {json:{name:'FIRSTNAME'}}, {json:{name:'CLUB_NAME'}}, {json:{name:'COUNTRY'}}, {json:{name:'CITY'}}, {json:{name:'QUALITY'}} ];

parameters.responseBody: ={{ { "started": true, "note": "Sync is reconciling list membership in the background; progress shows in Activity." } }}
